decisions.rationale: Valid API-layer asymmetry: createConversation, deleteConversation, fetchConversations, and fetchConversationById use try-table-then-onboarding_data fallback, but updateConversationCoachingMode and touchConversationAfterMessage only mutate profiles.onboarding_data. In a hybrid deploy where chatconversation rows exist, coaching_mode and sidebar preview/modified_date updates would not round-trip on table rows. However brownfield prototype has no chatconversation migration in supabase (grep confirms); the active path is onboarding_data and criteria_audit AC-1/AC-3, functional_audit FV-1/FV-4, and ui_evidence all pass. CHAT-05 decompose scope wires API parity with Bubble workflows and explicitly excludes schema migrations; CHAT-02/CHAT-04 triage deferred table-path QA to this wave but scope limited work to onboarding_data + best-effort create. Bundle try-table updates for coaching_mode and touchConversationAfterMessage with the deferred supabase chatconversation/chatmessage migration wave (mirrors DASH-04 C-3 dormant-table-branch and JOURNAL-04 C-1 layering deferrals) rather than block advance on unreachable table-update code today.

useChatSignOutClear clears ?conversation= when user becomes null — satisfying AC-3 LoggedOut bTIma parity and review ui_evidence bTImV/bTImb pass notes. Bubble store-reset semantics would also clear composer draft and invalidate sidebar caches; current SPA has no additional client caches beyond URL param and per-mount React state, so sign-out unmounts chat module context. criteria_audit AC-3 passes and functional_audit FV-3 passes. Low-priority future hardening if global chat context or sidebar listVersion caches are introduced — defer full store-reset (composer reset + sidebar list bump) to chat session lifecycle polish, not a CHAT-05 depends_on blocker.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 try-table parity for updateConversationCoachingMode/touchConversationAfterMessage to chat schema migration wave (CHAT-02/CHAT-04 anticipated table-path QA; prototype uses onboarding_data today); C-2 sign-out composer/sidebar cache reset to chat session lifecycle polish (URL clear satisfies AC-3).
